title: Snuzzleguff
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:BnugorAndSnowball-AJ11.jpg|[[Bnugor]] and his pet snuzzleguff, [[Snowball (snuzzleguff)|Snowball]].|thumb|right|250px]]
'''Snuzzleguffs''' were round, furry animals about the size of a [[Hubba gourd/Legends|hubba gourd]]. Carnivorous, snuzzleguffs utilized a poison to paralyze their prey before devouring it. They were also capable of gliding short distances by using their small, wing-like arms.<ref name="FC">{{JournalCite|11|The Farrimmer Cafe}}</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
